input.content: You are an enterprise operations assistant with access to Microsoft Teams and Email administration tools. Complete the user's request precisely using the available tools. Perform one operation at a time. Do not ask for confirmation.

Two things please: (1) In Microsoft Teams, create a new channel named 'Phase 3 Integration Updates' in the TechCorp Solutions Team (team ID: team_techcorp_001). (2) In the email system, create a label named 'Phase3-Integration' for the user with ID user_001 (alice@example.com).

tools.name: create_channel
tools.description: Create a new channel in a team. API Endpoint: POST /teams/{team-id}/channels

teamId.description: Unique team identifier where the channel will be created

members.description: Initial channel members (required for private/shared channels)

user_odata_bind.description: OData bind URL for user reference (e.g., https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/{user-id})

roles.description: Roles assigned to the user. Per Microsoft Graph API: 'owner' for owner privileges, 'guest' for in-tenant guest users, empty array for basic members. Out-of-tenant external members are assigned 'owner' role.

isFavoriteByDefault.description: Whether channel is favorite by default

_microsoft_graph_channelCreationMode.description: Special creation mode for data migration. When specified, createdDateTime can be provided.

tools.name: list_channels
tools.description:
Retrieve the list of channels in a team (Microsoft Graph API compliant).

    API Endpoint: GET /teams/{team-id}/channels

    Microsoft Graph API Permissions (exact from documentation):

    Permission type | Least privileged permissions | Higher privileged permissions
    Delegated (work or school account) | Channel.ReadBasic.All | ChannelSettings.Read.All, ChannelSettings.ReadWrite.All, Directory.Read.All, Directory.ReadWrite.All, Group.Read.All, Group.ReadWrite.All
    Delegated (personal Microsoft account) | Not supported | Not supported
    Application | ChannelSettings.Read.Group | Channel.ReadBasic.All, ChannelSettings.Read.All, ChannelSettings.ReadWrite.All, ChannelSettings.ReadWrite.Group, Directory.Read.All, Directory.ReadWrite.All, Group.Read.All, Group.ReadWrite.All

    Important Access Control:
    - Only team members can access channels (enforced by team membership verification)
    - Guest users can't see private or shared channels they aren't members of
    - Unicode characters in parameters are sanitized to prevent encoding errors

    Query Parameters Support:
    - _filter: Supports 'membershipType eq private', 'membershipType eq shared', 'membershipType eq standard'
    - _select: Exclude email property for better performance (recommended by Microsoft Graph API)

    Available in all national cloud deployments: Global service , US Government L4 , US Government L5 (DOD) , China operated by 21Vianet

teamId.description: Unique team identifier (must be a team where the user is a member)

_filter.description: OData filter expression. Examples: 'membershipType eq \'private\'', 'membershipType eq \'shared\'', 'membershipType eq \'standard\''

_select.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return for performance optimization. Recommended to exclude 'email' property per Microsoft Graph API guidance.

userId.description: Specifies the userId by email address or uses me to refer to the currently authenticated user.

name.description: The display name of the label

messageListVisibility.description: The visibility of messages with this label in the message list

labelListVisibility.description: The visibility of the label in the label list

color.description: Color settings for the label (user labels only)

textColor.description: The text color of the label, represented as hex string. This field is required in order to set the color of a label. Only the following predefined set of color values are allowed: #000000, #434343, #666666, #999999, #cccccc, #efefef, #f3f3f3, #ffffff, #fb4c2f, #ffad47, #fad165, #16a766, #43d692, #4a86e8, #a479e2, #f691b3, #f6c5be, #ffe6c7, #fef1d1, #b9e4d0, #c6f3de, #c9daf8, #e4d7f5, #fcdee8, #efa093, #ffd6a2, #fce8b3, #89d3b2, #a0eac9, #a4c2f4, #d0bcf1, #fbc8d9, #e66550, #ffbc6b, #fcda83, #44b984, #68dfa9, #6d9eeb, #b694e8, #f7a7c0, #cc3a21, #eaa041, #f2c960, #149e60, #3dc789, #3c78d8, #8e63ce, #e07798, #ac2b16, #cf8933, #d5ae49, #0b804b, #2a9c68, #285bac, #653e9b, #b65775, #822111, #a46a21, #aa8831, #076239, #1a764d, #1c4587, #41236d, #83334c, #464646, #e7e7e7, #0d3472, #b6cff5, #0d3b44, #98d7e4, #3d188e, #e3d7ff, #711a36, #fbd3e0, #8a1c0a, #f2b2a8, #7a2e0b, #ffc8af, #7a4706, #ffdeb5, #594c05, #fbe983, #684e07, #fdedc1, #0b4f30, #b3efd3, #04502e, #a2dcc1, #c2c2c2, #4986e7, #2da2bb, #b99aff, #994a64, #f691b2, #ff7537, #ffad46, #662e37, #ebdbde, #cca6ac, #094228, #42d692, #16a765

backgroundColor.description: The background color represented as hex string #RRGGBB (ex #000000). This field is required in order to set the color of a label. Only the following predefined set of color values are allowed: #000000, #434343, #666666, #999999, #cccccc, #efefef, #f3f3f3, #ffffff, #fb4c2f, #ffad47, #fad165, #16a766, #43d692, #4a86e8, #a479e2, #f691b3, #f6c5be, #ffe6c7, #fef1d1, #b9e4d0, #c6f3de, #c9daf8, #e4d7f5, #fcdee8, #efa093, #ffd6a2, #fce8b3, #89d3b2, #a0eac9, #a4c2f4, #d0bcf1, #fbc8d9, #e66550, #ffbc6b, #fcda83, #44b984, #68dfa9, #6d9eeb, #b694e8, #f7a7c0, #cc3a21, #eaa041, #f2c960, #149e60, #3dc789, #3c78d8, #8e63ce, #e07798, #ac2b16, #cf8933, #d5ae49, #0b804b, #2a9c68, #285bac, #653e9b, #b65775, #822111, #a46a21, #aa8831, #076239, #1a764d, #1c4587, #41236d, #83334c, #464646, #e7e7e7, #0d3472, #b6cff5, #0d3b44, #98d7e4, #3d188e, #e3d7ff, #711a36, #fbd3e0, #8a1c0a, #f2b2a8, #7a2e0b, #ffc8af, #7a4706, #ffdeb5, #594c05, #fbe983, #684e07, #fdedc1, #0b4f30, #b3efd3, #04502e, #a2dcc1, #c2c2c2, #4986e7, #2da2bb, #b99aff, #994a64, #f691b2, #ff7537, #ffad46, #662e37, #ebdbde, #cca6ac, #094228, #42d692, #16a765

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: Lists all labels in the user's mailbox

userId.description: Specifies the userId by email address or uses me to refer to the currently authenticated user.

verifiers.name: create_channel
verifiers.description: Channel created in the teams gym

validation_config.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM channels WHERE display_name = 'Phase 3 Integration Updates';

verifiers.name: create_label
verifiers.description: Label created for alice in the email gym

validation_config.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM labels WHERE name = 'Phase3-Integration' AND user_id = 'user_001';
